title: Launch
subtitle: Start Star Citizen
status.running: RSI Launcher is running - press Stop to close
tooltip.esync: Eventfd-based synchronization - reduces CPU overhead in Wine
tooltip.fsync: Futex-based synchronization - faster than ESync on supported kernels
tooltip.mangohud: On-screen performance overlay (FPS, CPU, GPU, RAM)
tooltip.dxvkHud: DXVK-specific overlay showing draw calls and compiler activity
tooltip.wayland: Enable Wayland protocol support in Wine
tooltip.waylandFractional: Fractional scaling detected - Wayland mode is not compatible with fractional scaling. Set all monitors to integer scaling (100%, 200%) to use this option.
tooltip.waylandMonitor: Force game to a specific Wayland output. Requires a GE-Proton or Mactan runner with WAYLANDDRV_PRIMARY_MONITOR support.
tooltip.envVarConflict: This variable overrides a built-in setting
desc.waylandWarning: These settings are completely experimental and may have no effect depending on your runner.
desc.customEnvHint: Add custom environment variables for Wine/Proton launches. These override built-in variables with the same name.
desc.fractionalScalingWarning: Fractional scaling active - Wayland mode disabled
tooltip.gamemode: Feral GameMode - optimizes CPU governor and scheduler for gaming
tooltip.nvidiaDlss: DLSS 4.0 with Super Resolution, Ray Reconstruction and Frame Generation
tooltip.nvidiaSmoothMotion: Reduced latency rendering on compatible NVIDIA cards
tooltip.amdRadv: Fixes bright flickering lights at edges of in-game display panels (radv_zero_vram=true)
tooltip.amdNogttspill: Addresses framerate drops and stuttering, especially with <8GB VRAM (RADV_PERFTEST=nogttspill)
tooltip.inProcessGpu: Fixes black or white RSI Launcher window (--in-process-gpu flag)
tooltip.vulkanMailbox: Resolves Vulkan assertion failures and swapchain crashes (MESA_VK_WSI_PRESENT_MODE=mailbox)
tooltip.enableHdrWsi: HDR layer required for NVIDIA without a color manager (ENABLE_HDR_WSI=1)
tooltip.gamescopeEnable: Launch inside the Gamescope compositor for HDR, resolution scaling and cursor capture
tooltip.gamescopeGrabCursor: Force cursor grab to prevent escape (--force-grab-cursor)
label.gamemodeNotInstalled: gamemoderun not found - install gamemode package
